# WhisperShortcut 7.64

Chat readability and slash-command polish, plus more reliable AI titles and meeting transcripts.

## Installation

Download the latest build from the [Releases page](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases), move **WhisperShortcut.app** to your Applications folder, and launch it.

## What's New

### More comfortable chat reading
- **Larger body text** (now 16 pt) for easier reading across long answers.
- The composer's action buttons now show their **slash-command names** — `/attach`, `/screenshot`, `/new`, `/meeting` — so the typed shortcuts are discoverable at a glance.

### Slash-command menu improvements
- The slash-command popup is now **scrollable**, so you can reach every command even in a long list.
- You can now **click a command** in the popup to run it (no longer keyboard-only).

### Smarter, more reliable chat
- **More robust AI title generation** for chats and meetings.
- **Grok web citations** are now shown for grounded answers, matching the existing Gemini citations.

### Meeting improvements
- The sidebar now **collapses older meeting date groups** by default, keeping the list short and focused.
- Meeting chats can **refine the summary and correct transcript terms** via tools for more accurate notes.
- **Fixed transcript parsing for long meetings**, with a deduplicated, more reliable parser.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/compare/v7.63...v7.64
